_note: SSH key authentication is REQUIRED. Never use password-based SSH for test VMs. Configure key-based auth before using /test.
_docs_dangerous_operations: Lists system-level operations that trigger Phase V (VM-isolated testing). When a project modifies PAM, systemd services, kernel parameters, or requires reboots, /test routes these operations to a VM instead of running them on the host. Add entries here to force VM isolation for specific operation types.
_docs_test_sequences: Defines named multi-step test workflows executed inside the VM. Each sequence is an ordered list of steps (deploy, install, validate, reboot, etc.) that /test runs sequentially. Use these to codify repeatable test scenarios — e.g., 'install-and-reboot' deploys the app, installs it, reboots the VM, then validates the installation survived the reboot.

vm_testing.description: Default test VM for isolated testing (CachyOS with KDE)

test_environments.name: test-vm-cachyos
test_environments.description: CachyOS KDE - primary test VM for isolation testing

notes.setup_instructions: Copy this file to your project root and customize for project-specific VM testing needs
